summary: Frontend-only smoke test for 3 new changes on SkillEn: logo image swap, ScrollToTop on route change, and TrendingJobs widget on home. All 5 checks passed.
passed: Nav logo renders real brand with src https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_skill-launch-3/artifacts/pnf7vadm_skillen%2C%20logo.jpg
Footer logo also renders the same brand image

TrendingJobs widget visible on home with label 'TRENDING NOW', heading 'Fresh openings — apply today.', view-all link href=/jobs, and exactly 3 cards (trending-job-*) populated from /api/jobs?limit=3 (verified card content e.g. INTERNSHIP / Sales Intern / SkillEn Partner Co. / Remote)
ScrollToTop works on route change: from home scrolled to bottom (scrollY=5092), clicking footer link /students -> scrollY=0; clicking footer link /companies -> scrollY=0
Regression: /jobs page loads and renders job listings (Sales Intern, Business Development Associate) with filters (ALL/JOB/INTERNSHIP) and search input
